playwright.strength: browser use via the Playwright MCP
playwright.prompt: This is a capability probe. Using your Playwright MCP browser tools, navigate to about:blank and read the current URL back through a browser tool call. If every tool call actually succeeded, reply with exactly one line: PLAYWRIGHT_OK <the url you read>. If the Playwright browser tools are not available to you, reply with exactly one line: CAPABILITY_MISSING. Never simulate a tool call.

chrome_devtools.strength: browser use via the Chrome DevTools MCP
chrome_devtools.prompt: This is a capability probe. Using your Chrome DevTools MCP tools, list the open pages and count them. If the tool call actually succeeded, reply with exactly one line: DEVTOOLS_OK <the count>. If the Chrome DevTools tools are not available to you, reply with exactly one line: CAPABILITY_MISSING. Never simulate a tool call.

computer_use.strength: computer use via the cua MCP
computer_use.prompt: This is a capability probe. Using your cua computer-use MCP, call get_screen_size and report the result. If the tool call actually succeeded, reply with exactly one line: CUA_OK <width>x<height>. If the cua tools are not available to you, reply with exactly one line: CAPABILITY_MISSING. Never simulate a tool call.
